items.title: Regional Mediators Rush to Save U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire
items.summary: Pakistan and Qatar have dispatched teams to Tehran under the looming threat of resumed war, after weeks of diplomacy failed to produce an agreement.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.summary: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

items.title: Allahabad HC pulls up Uttar Pradesh police over concealment of arms licence details of influential persons
items.summary: Data placed before the court showed that Uttar Pradesh has over 10 lakh arms licences, and out of these, 6,062 licences were issued to persons facing two or more criminal cases
